desc: Hindu priests perform ceremonial rituals as an act of worship and devotion amidst sacred chants at the shrine of Maa Vaishno Devi, seeking divine blessings for a fulfilled life.

title: Ujda Chaman
desc: Chaman, a lecturer, has trouble finding a suitable bride due to his receding hairline. Chaos ensues when an astrologer predicts that he will remain celibate if unmarried till the age of 31.

title: Shaadaa
desc: Chadta's parents desperately want him to get married and are relieved when he finally meets a girl. However, things take a turn when the girl says she does not believe in marriage.
